rulings.Case Title: AMY SIU PING CHAN ET AL VS. JIM K FUNG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Quash Service Of Summons, Set Aside Default And Default Interlocutory Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for AUG 27, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANT JIN FUNG's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons, Set Aside Default And Default Interlocutory Judgment DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1112(a)(1) and CRC 3.1110 (a). Also, moving party failed to cite any authority for the proposition that a motion to quash may be brought at this stage of the litigation, i.e. after default and interlocutory judgment have already been entered. To the extent this motion may be construed as a motion to vacate (in the absence of Notice of Motion or any authority cited in support of the motion to vacate) it is also DENIED because moving party failed to carry its burden under CCP 473(b), CCP 473(d), CCP 473.5 or for equitable relief. Finally, moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MARY NICHOLS VS. MARK STREHLOW ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Permission To File A Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for AUG 27, 2018 line 2. PLAINTIFF MARY NICHOLS's Motion For Permission To File A Second Amended Complaint GRANTED. Trial is continued to January 22, 2018. Plaintiff is to fully cooperate with discovery pertaining to new allegations, including appearance at a deposition (limited to new allegations). Second Amended Complaint to be filed and served no later than August 28, 2018. Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment is ordered off calendar, moot. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MARY NICHOLS VS. MARK STREHLOW ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Mark Strehlows Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Cross-Complaint Mark Strehlows
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for AUG 27, 2018 line 2. Notice Of Mark Strehlows Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Cross-Complaint Mark Strehlows GRANTED. First Amended Cross-Complaint to be filed and served no later that August 28, 2018. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MADHAV SURI ET AL VS. NORTH PING YUEN, L.P. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs' Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Establishing Deemed Admissions (Ccp 2033.280)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for AUG 27, 2018 line 3. PLAINTIFFs MADHAV SURI, ANURADHA SURI, and ARJUN SURI's Motion For Order Establishing Deemed Admissions (Ccp 2033.280) GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $950. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion To Compel Deposition Of Defendant Haley Gonzaba
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for AUG 27, 2018 line 4. PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC's Motion To Compel Deposition Of Defendant Haley Gonzaba OFF CALENDAR. Dismissal on file. = (501/CFH)
